properties.name: Quinlan Community Center Gazebo Meetup Spot
properties.desc:
This is the meetup spot mainly used for our guided group on Raid Days/Hours where we walk together to clear as many Gyms as possible.

The guided raid group meets up here for Raid Hour every Wednesday at 6:00pm. The quick raid group meets up at the same time on the other side of the park at the Veterans Memorial.

properties.name: Veterans Memorial Meetup Spot
properties.desc:
This is the meetup spot mainly used for our quick raid group during Raid Hours where players who only have time to clear 2–3 Gyms will complete them together.

The quick raid group meets up here for Raid Hour every Wednesday at 6:00pm. The guided raid group meets up at the same time on the other side of the park at the Quinlan Community Center gazebo.

properties.name: Hinson Campus Center Meetup Spot
properties.desc:
This is our main meetup location for non-Raid/non-Max Battle events such as Community Days, Spotlight Hours, and Friendship Fridays.

We typically gather on the outdoor patio, but may move indoors depending on the weather and planned activities.
